name: Shareable SoftJunk Order Link
purpose: Create a shareable URL, PayPal note, and buyer handoff for a 5 USD custom lead follow-up sequence.
privacy_rule: Use only non-sensitive business context in the URL. Do not include customer names, phone numbers, emails, addresses, PayPal transaction IDs, or private lead details.
generated_paypal_note_template: Custom Sequence | Business: [business] | Service: [service] | Source: [source] | Tone: [tone] | Need: [need] | Next: [next] | Value: [value]
agent_instruction: When the buyer has enough order context, send them to the shareable order link page or create a URL with the query parameters, then tell them to copy the generated PayPal note and pay exactly 5 USD at the PayPal URL.
fulfillment_rule: Do not claim the order is paid, started, or delivered unless the seller can see the 5 USD PayPal transaction, the API verifier returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true, or a trusted seller-side PayPal CSV export returns PAYPAL_PAYMENT_VERIFIED=true source=csv.
